no title

2008-10-28 Leave a comment

The Firefox add-on China Channel offers internet users outside of China the ability to surf the web as if they were inside mainland China. Take an unforgetable virtual trip to China and experience the technical expertise of the Chinese Ministry of Information Industry (supported by western companies). It’s open source, free and easy.

http://vimeo.com/2082279

http://chinachannel.hk/

Alessandro Arrichiello

I'm Alessandro Arrichiello, graduated in Computer Engineering at Federico II university of Naples (Master Degree). I am a computer enthusiast, I like to try and study all new types of technologies as can be seen in the archives of my blog.

Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic. – Arthur Charles Clarke
